title: Logical Reasoning Path
description: Build fluency in Logical Reasoning inside Reasoning Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Chain-of-Thought Agent
steps.summary: Chain-of-Thought Agent belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought and Agent. It opens into Cross-Agent Chain of Thought and Multi-Agent Chain of Thought.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Memory Chain of Thought Models
steps.summary: Memory Chain of Thought Models belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought and Memory network. It opens into Memory-Enhanced Chain of Thought and Memory-Augmented Chain of Thought.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Chain of Thought (CoT)
steps.summary: Chain of Thought (CoT) belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought. It opens into Chain-of-Thought Reasoning (CoT) and Automatic Chain of Thought (Auto-CoT).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Chain of Verification
steps.summary: Chain of Verification belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Verification. It opens into Chain-of-Verification (CoVe) and Chain-of-Thought with Verification.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Graph of Thought
steps.summary: Graph of Thought belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Graph. It opens into Graph of Thought (GoT) and Graph-of-Thought Agents.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Chain-of-Thought RAG
steps.summary: Chain-of-Thought RAG belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought and RAG. It opens into Chain of Thought Guided RAG and RAG with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: RAG with Chain of Thought
steps.summary: RAG with Chain of Thought belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought and RAG. It opens into Chain of Thought Guided RAG and RAG with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
steps.summary: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning belongs to the Reasoning Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reasoning Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after Chain of Thought. It opens into Chain-of-Thought Reasoning (CoT) and RAG with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
